/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/cpp_racer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_racer.dir/src/car.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_racer.dir/src/track.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_racer.dir/src/ai.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_racer.dir/src/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_racer.dir/src/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_racer.dir/src/gl_core.cpp.o -o cpp_racer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
